⚠️ **Only file LOW + MEDIUM-severity issues here.** Anything that could
move funds, brick a contract, or leak PII goes through the encrypted
disclosure path in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md). We respond to
encrypted disclosures within 48 hours.
